name: prospector-de-sites
description: Run a tracked local-business website sales pipeline from prospecting through contracts.

interface.shortDescription: Run a complete website-prospecting and client pipeline.
interface.longDescription: Qualify leads, create factual HTML redesigns, manage a local dashboard, publish proposal covers and sites, track Gmail replies and follow-ups, and prepare reviewed service contracts.
capabilities: Browser visual editor and comparison page
Service contract HTML and DOCX drafts
defaultPrompt: Configure my Prospector de Sites workspace.
Find and qualify website redesign leads.
